description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior walls are primarily white with large, rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front facade features a prominent entry staircase leading up to a covered porch area, flanked by greenery and a double garage below. The rear of the property includes a spacious, fenced-in lawn, while the sides are bordered by dark fencing and minimal landscaping. The building's design emphasizes symmetry and openness, with expansive glass doors and windows on the ground floor. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story white bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and a covered front porch above a double garage, surrounded by a fenced yard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long white facade, large windows, and fenced yard with minimal landscaping.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the entry staircase, covered porch, double garage, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a similar long facade, large windows, and a clear view of the rear lawn.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the covered porch, entry steps, garage doors, and greenery flanking the entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
